title: primula auricula var. ciliata
intro: Primula auricula var. ciliata, also known as fringed auricula, is a type of flowering plant in the Primulaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Primula auricula var. ciliata are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal problems and anxiety. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
